hooks.command: repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || { echo "shipit: tool guard could not locate the git checkout root — refusing the tool call rather than allowing an unchecked coordinator edit." >&2; exit 2; }; pixi run --manifest-path "$repo/pixi.toml" -- "$repo/bin/shipit" hook pretooluse; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then echo "shipit: tool guard could not run (rc=$rc) — refusing the tool call rather than allowing an unchecked coordinator edit. Likely causes: the session cwd is not inside a shipit checkout, pixi is not installed, or the pinned shipit environment could not be resolved. Install pixi (https://pixi.sh) if it is missing, then run this command from the project to see the underlying error: pixi run --manifest-path \"$repo/pixi.toml\" -- \"$repo/bin/shipit\" hook pretooluse" >&2; exit 2; fi; : "shipit hook pretooluse"

repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || repo=$PWD; if [ -x "$repo/bin/setup-dev-env.sh" ]; then "$repo/bin/setup-dev-env.sh" || echo "shipit: setup-dev-env.sh reported a problem — continuing (base-system provisioning is best-effort)." >&2; fi; test -x "$repo/bin/shipit" || { echo "shipit: bin/shipit launcher not present or executable here — skipping this managed hook (run 'shipit install' to (re)provision it)."; exit 0; }; py=$(command -v python3 || command -v python || true); if [ -n "$py" ]; then "$py" -c 'import json, os; print(json.dumps({"cwd": os.getcwd()}))' | "$repo/bin/shipit" hook sessionstart; fi; : "shipit hook sessionstart"
